action.reasoning: Observation: Iter22 train.py crashed due to missing argparse import. Previous best test accuracy 0.7563 (ResNet-18, full replay, joint training). We need to fix import and run wide ResNet (width=2) with mixup/cutmix, longer joint epochs (300) to beat 0.7563. Analysis: Wide ResNet (44M params) with advanced augmentation and joint training should push accuracy higher. Time budget (3h) is sufficient. Decision: Write clean train.py with all necessary imports, label smoothing via custom module, proper logging, num_workers=0, and run full training (5 epochs/task sequential + 300 joint epochs). Then submit eval on best checkpoint.
